name: Helius Sender

api_key.how_to_get: Sign up at https://dashboard.helius.dev, go to API Keys section, click Create New API Key
api_key.note: Sender API key is separate from RPC API key; contact Helius sales for custom TPS sender key

min_tip_sol.note: Tip is a native SOL transfer to one of the tip wallet addresses above

cost_on_failure: no cost — 0 credits consumed, no SOL lost (tip only transfers on successful landing)

frontend_https.note: Auto-routes to nearest region. Use for browser/frontend.

backend_http_regional.note: HTTP (not HTTPS) for lower latency from servers. Pick closest to your VPS.

ping.note: GET request to warm connection. Use if idle > 1 minute.

query_params.swqos_only: true (optional, routes exclusively via SWQOS, lower min tip)

sender.elevation: Contact Helius sales for custom TPS

sendTransaction.description: Submit a serialized transaction via dual routing (staked validators + Jito) or SWQOS-only

params_detail.transaction: Serialized versioned (v0) transaction as base64 or base58 string

requirements: Transaction MUST include a native SOL transfer to one of the tip wallets
Compute budget instructions should be at the beginning of the transaction

ping.description: Warm the connection to prevent idle timeouts

getPriorityFeeEstimate.description: Get recommended priority fee for a transaction or set of accounts

options.priorityLevel: Min | Low | Medium | High | VeryHigh | UnsafeMax

-32602.message: Invalid request (missing tip, priority fee, invalid params)

features.dual_routing: Transactions are routed to both Solana validators (via staked connections) and Jito infrastructure simultaneously for maximum landing probability
features.swqos_only_mode: Optional ?swqos_only=true parameter routes exclusively through SWQOS (Stake-Weighted Quality of Service) — lower min tip (0.000005 SOL) but no Jito bundle inclusion
features.staked_connections: Direct routing to block leaders via Solana's largest validator, bypassing public queues. Paid plans only.
features.regional_endpoints: 7 global regions (SLC, EWR, LON, FRA, AMS, SG, TYO) for lowest latency from backend servers
features.connection_warming: Ping endpoint to maintain active connections during idle periods > 1 minute
features.priority_fee_api: Built-in getPriorityFeeEstimate RPC method with 6 fee tiers and recommended mode
features.zero_credits: Sender service consumes 0 API credits on all plans
features.transaction_rebates: Automatic SOL rebates via post-trade backruns available as an option
features.smart_transactions: SDK method (Node.js v1.3.2+, Rust v0.1.5+) that auto-handles blockhash, CU simulation, fee estimation, optimization, and confirmation polling
features.v0_transactions: Supports versioned v0 transaction format with address lookup tables

best_practices.compute_units: Simulate transaction first, set CU limit to actual consumption * 1.1 rounded up
best_practices.blockhash: Use commitment level 'confirmed' when fetching latest blockhash
best_practices.retry: Set maxRetries=0 and implement custom retry logic. Blockhash valid for ~150 slots (~60 seconds).
best_practices.timeout: 60-second overall timeout, poll confirmation every 5 seconds for up to 15 seconds
